action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from scratch. Analysis: Need to establish a baseline for Class-Incremental Learning on CIFAR-100. I will implement a simple Experience Replay (ER) baseline using a pretrained ResNet18. I will train for only 2 epochs per task to quickly verify the pipeline, measure iteration time, and get an initial accuracy score. Decision: Write model.py, train.py, and predict.py, then run training and submit for evaluation.
